overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a futuristic flying vehicle navigating through a dystopian urban wasteland environment in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle flies over highways, passes through a large bridge structure with striped barriers, traverses a massive trash dump, and continues over industrial desert landscapes under clear midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange on city outskirts

events.description: approaching large bridge structure with concrete support pillars

agents.ego_description: piloting the flying vehicle over a highway interchange, approaching the bridge structure

entered.detail: multi-level highway junction with curved ramps below the flight path
distant futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon
large concrete bridge with tall support pillars approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person cockpit view flying over a highway interchange on the outskirts of a dystopian city. The vehicle approaches a large bridge structure while the city skyline remains visible in the distance. The environment is bright and clear with sparse desert vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: flying through large bridge infrastructure with striped safety barriers

events.description: entering the covered bridge structure with red and white striped support columns
exiting the bridge structure into open air over the wasteland

agents.ego_description: navigating through the confined bridge structure, maintaining steady altitude between support pillars and striped barriers

entered.detail: red and white striped safety barriers lining the bridge passage
solid overhead structure of the bridge creating partial cover

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the bridge structure, passing through a corridor of red and white striped barriers with the bridge deck overhead. Lighting becomes mixed as shadows from the structure create contrast. The city skyline fades from view as the vehicle traverses the covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive trash dump and wasteland with scattered debris and shipping containers

events.description: flying over expansive trash wasteland with dense debris field and container stacks
slight descent while maneuvering over the trash heaps and container formations

agents.ego_description: flying low over the trash wasteland, navigating between debris mounds and red shipping container stacks

entered.detail: expansive field of garbage and debris covering the ground below
stacks of red and brown shipping containers scattered throughout the waste

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the vehicle descends over a massive trash wasteland filled with debris and shipping containers. The ground is covered in refuse and discarded materials, with container stacks creating vertical elements in the otherwise flat terrain. The vehicle maintains a lower altitude to navigate the complex landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial zone with high voltage power lines and transmission towers

events.description: entering industrial area with large electrical transmission towers and power lines
banking left to navigate around power line structures and transmission towers

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through industrial power line corridor, banking left around transmission towers and electrical infrastructure

entered.detail: tall metal lattice towers supporting high voltage electrical lines
thick cables stretching between transmission towers across the flight path

segments.scene_description: The vehicle transitions into an industrial zone dominated by massive power transmission towers and electrical lines. The camera banks left to navigate around the infrastructure, leaving the trash wasteland behind. Industrial buildings and ruins appear on the periphery as the vehicle continues through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert landscape with distant mountains and scattered ruins

events.description: transitioning from industrial zone to open desert terrain with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: flying over open desert landscape toward distant mountain range, passing scattered structures and desert vegetation

entered.detail: sandy desert ground with sparse vegetation and distant rock formations
large mountain range visible on the horizon under the clear sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle leaving the industrial area behind and flying over open desert terrain. The landscape features sandy ground, sparse desert vegetation, and a prominent mountain range in the distance. The environment becomes more natural and expansive as the vehicle continues toward the mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight from the open outskirts of a dystopian city into the depths of a sprawling industrial wasteland. It begins by gliding over a bright highway interchange with the city skyline visible in the distance and sparse desert vegetation below. As the vehicle approaches a large bridge, the scene shifts into a covered corridor of red and white striped barriers where the open sunlight gives way to contrasting shadows and the skyline fades from view. The camera then emerges from the structure and descends in altitude, transitioning from the architectural confines of the bridge to a massive trash wasteland. Finally, the view sweeps over a landscape of refuse and discarded materials, navigating between towering stacks of shipping containers across the debris-strewn terrain.

The shot follows a continuous flight path that transitions from a cluttered industrial zone into a vast, open desert landscape. It begins by banking left to navigate around massive power transmission towers and electrical lines, leaving the trash wasteland behind. As the vehicle moves through this corridor, industrial buildings and ruins flicker on the periphery before the urban decay begins to thin. The scene then opens up as the vehicle leaves the industrial infrastructure behind, gliding over sandy ground and sparse desert vegetation. Finally, the environment becomes expansive and natural, with the camera heading toward a prominent mountain range in the distance under a clear sky.
